label: B2B Marketing Agency
keyInsight: 85% lower operational cost with 47% more output. The AI-native agency achieves hyper-personalized outreach at scale, dropping cost-per-lead from $56.67 to $5.45.
source: Compiled from industry benchmarks and AI-native startup financial disclosures (2025-2026)

label: Outsourced Bookkeeping / CAS
keyInsight: Real-time reporting replaces batch processing. A two-person AI firm delivers instant scenario modeling and predictive cash flow — services that traditional firms charge premium advisory fees for.
source: Derived from professional services AI adoption benchmarks and CAS industry analysis (2025-2026)

label: Specialized Legal Review
keyInsight: Infinite reading capacity with near-instant turnaround. AI-native legal firms treat each matter as a standalone model, eliminating the billable hour in favor of outcome-based pricing.
source: Based on AI-native legal firm case studies and professional services disruption analysis (2025-2026)

label: Freight Brokerage
keyInsight: AI platforms scale freight volumes 300-400% without increasing headcount. Predictive load matching and autonomous carrier negotiations eliminate communication latency that plagues legacy supply chains.
source: Based on AI freight platform performance data and logistics industry analysis (2025-2026)

label: Customer Support / BPO
keyInsight: AI voice and text agents deflect up to 80% of routine inquiries. The remaining human team focuses exclusively on complex escalations and relationship management.
source: Based on customer support automation benchmarks and BPO industry disruption analysis (2025-2026)
